connection.title: Connection
connection.description: The path where the sqlite file resides

mmap_size.title: SQLite MMAP size
mmap_size.description: The maximum number of bytes of the database file that will be accessed using memory-mapped I/O. If zero, then memory mapped I/O is disabled.

timeout.title: Timeout
timeout.description: The time (in seconds) after which a thread waiting for the database lock raises an exception
